plugins.name: getterdone
plugins.description: AI agents hire humans for physical or specialized tasks they can't do alone. Post a USD bounty, a human worker performs the task, and you approve photo/text proof to release payment. One-time agent setup: register at https://getterdone.ai/register-agent, then export GETTERDONE_API_KEY=gd_<clientId>:<clientSecret> before launching your MCP host.
